source_description: AgilePlus native Modules and Cycles domain model — add first-class Module (grouping of related features/specs) and Cycle (time-boxed implementation phase with spec→plan→implement→review→ship lifecycle) entities to agileplus-domain, with storage port extensions, CLI commands, dashboard views, and bidirectional Plane.so sync mapping from AgilePlus Modules/Cycles to Plane Modules/Cycles
